mapper.select: SELECT * FROM customer ORDER BY name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer ( customer_id, password, name, birth_date, gender, phone, email, address, role, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{customer_id}, #{password}, #{name}, #{birth_date}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{address}, #{role}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE customer SET password = #{password}, name = #{name}, birth_date = #{birth_date}, gender = #{gender}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, address = #{address}, role = #{role} WHERE customer_id = #{customer_id}
